title: cacalia mansoana
intro: Cacalia mansoana, also known as Kukui or Mā'o, is a plant species native to Hawaii and other parts of the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cacalia mansoana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cacalia mansoana include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
